verdicts.trial_title: An External Control Arm Study in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
verdicts.cohort_label: Cohort 9 — EGFR mutations, second line or later after osimertinib monotherapy

criterion.text: Greater than 18 years of age at the time of informed consent

criteria.evidence_span: 58-year-old woman with Stage IV lung adenocarcinoma (AJCC 8th ed).
criteria.rationale: Patient is 58 years old.

criterion.text: Pathologically confirmed locally advanced or metastatic NSCLC

criteria.evidence_span: 58-year-old woman with Stage IV lung adenocarcinoma (AJCC 8th ed).
criteria.rationale: Metastatic NSCLC confirmed in chart.

criterion.text: ECOG Performance of less than or equal to 1 within 4 weeks prior to starting index therapy

criteria.evidence_span: ECOG performance status 1.
criteria.rationale: ECOG ≤1 documented.

criterion.text: Life expectancy of more than 3 months

criteria.evidence_span: Prognosis: treating oncologist estimates life expectancy greater than 6 months.
criteria.rationale: Life expectancy explicitly documented by treating oncologist.

criterion.text: Able to understand and sign informed consent

criteria.evidence_span: Patient able to understand and willing to sign informed consent.
criteria.rationale: Patient able and willing to provide informed consent.

criterion.text: Evidence of measurable disease on available imaging (CT, MRI, PET)

criteria.evidence_span: CT chest: RUL target lesion 2.4 cm, measurable per RECIST 1.1.
criteria.rationale: Measurable disease per RECIST documented.

criterion.text: Patients with EGFR mutations starting second line or later line of therapy, after previously being treated with osimertinib monotherapy

criteria.evidence_span: NGS: EGFR exon 19 deletion (p.E746_A750del). ALK/ROS1 negative.
criteria.rationale: EGFR sensitizing mutation documented on NGS.

criterion.text: Actively on a clinical trial of an investigational agent

criteria.evidence_span: First-line osimertinib 80 mg daily started 2025-09; radiographic progression 2026-05 (RECIST 1.1).
criteria.rationale: On FDA-approved osimertinib — not documented as on an investigational agent.

criterion.text: Currently receiving active systemic therapy for another malignancy

criteria.evidence_span: No history of interstitial lung disease. No prior chemotherapy.
criteria.rationale: No active systemic therapy for another malignancy documented.

criterion.text: Eligible for treatment with curative intent

criteria.evidence_span: 58-year-old woman with Stage IV lung adenocarcinoma (AJCC 8th ed).
criteria.rationale: Stage IV disease — not eligible for curative-intent therapy.

verdicts.trial_title: A Clinical Study to Test if an Investigational Treatment Called BNT326 is Safe and Potentially Beneficial When Used Alone or in Combination With Other Investigational Treatments Such as BNT327, for People With Advanced Malignant Tumors
verdicts.cohort_label: Cohort 1C — EGFR exon 19del/L858R, 1–2 prior lines incl. 3rd-gen TKI, progressed

criterion.text: Documented positive test results for an EGFR-sensitizing mutation (Exon 21-L858R and 19del)

criteria.evidence_span: NGS: EGFR exon 19 deletion (p.E746_A750del). ALK/ROS1 negative.
criteria.rationale: EGFR sensitizing mutation documented on NGS.

criterion.text: Prior lines must include a third-generation EGFR TKI with progression

criteria.evidence_span: First-line osimertinib 80 mg daily started 2025-09; radiographic progression 2026-05 (RECIST 1.1).
criteria.rationale: Third-generation EGFR TKI with documented progression.

criterion.text: Have ECOG performance status of 0 or 1

criteria.evidence_span: ECOG performance status 1.
criteria.rationale: ECOG ≤1 documented.

criterion.text: Have measurable disease defined by RECIST v1.1

criteria.evidence_span: CT chest: RUL target lesion 2.4 cm, measurable per RECIST 1.1.
criteria.rationale: Measurable disease per RECIST documented.

criterion.text: Have adequate organ and bone marrow function within 7 days before randomization/enrollment

criteria.evidence_span: 2026-06: ANC 3.1, Hgb 11.8, Plt 220k, bili 0.7, Cr 0.9, AST/ALT normal — adequate organ/marrow function.
criteria.rationale: Adequate organ and marrow function documented. (Re-selected supporting chart line L0007.)

criterion.text: Have LVEF <50% by either echocardiography or multi-gated acquisition (scanning) within 28 days before randomization/enrollment

criteria.rationale: Chart contains no echocardiogram or LVEF measurement.

criterion.text: Have a history of interstitial lung disease (ILD)/pneumonitis that required steroids

criteria.evidence_span: No history of interstitial lung disease. No prior chemotherapy.
criteria.rationale: No ILD history — exclusion does not apply.

verdicts.trial_title: Sunvozertinib Plus Anlotinib as 1L Treatment in EGFR-Sensitive Mutations Combined With Co-Mutations Advanced NSCLC

criterion.text: EGFR-sensitive mutation confirmed

criteria.evidence_span: NGS: EGFR exon 19 deletion (p.E746_A750del). ALK/ROS1 negative.
criteria.rationale: EGFR sensitizing mutation documented on NGS.

criterion.text: Non-small cell lung cancer without systemic treatment

criteria.evidence_span: First-line osimertinib 80 mg daily started 2025-09; radiographic progression 2026-05 (RECIST 1.1).
criteria.rationale: Patient received prior systemic therapy — not treatment-naïve.

criterion.text: ECOG 0 - 1

criteria.evidence_span: ECOG performance status 1.
criteria.rationale: ECOG ≤1 documented.

criterion.text: Presence of measurable lesions according to RECIST 1.1

criteria.evidence_span: CT chest: RUL target lesion 2.4 cm, measurable per RECIST 1.1.
criteria.rationale: Measurable disease per RECIST documented.

criterion.text: Prior systemic therapy for locally advanced or metastatic disease

criteria.evidence_span: First-line osimertinib 80 mg daily started 2025-09; radiographic progression 2026-05 (RECIST 1.1).
criteria.rationale: Prior osimertinib constitutes prior systemic therapy — exclusion fires.
